_paste_this_into_openclaw_json_under_age: Replace placeholders. Each new agent needs its own bot token + private channel. The token name in bot_token_env must also be added to ~/openclaw/.env on the VPS. allowFrom MUST include the user's Discord ID + every OTHER agent bot's Discord ID (not this bot's own ID). When you add this agent, also append this bot's user ID to every OTHER agent's allowFrom in this file.
